creator: draco@marino.st
text:
If it's all the same, I'd rather just leave this PR open.  Yes, it 
should have been closed a long time again, perhaps, but it wasn't and 
that caused me to add to this one rather than open a new PR.

Otherwise if this is closed, I have to open a new PR anyway which is 
getting bureaucratic and not addressing the fact that this port doesn't 
build at all now.

So at least based on TCL version, it should be marked broken.  When that 
happens, the PR can/should be closed.

Thanks,
John
